leadText: Veilstone Cape (Japanese: 帳岬 Curtain Cape) is an area located in the center of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It stretches between Windbreak Stand and Lunker's Lair. Warden Palina of the Pearl Clan is encountered here for the first time, mourning the loss of the late Lord Arcanine.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Veilstone Cape is long stretch of mountain that extends from the mainland out to the sea, isolating the southern shore of the Cobalt Coastlands from the northern shore . The path that runs across the length of the area is marked by gentle hills and sparse Berry trees . Two stone "fingers" at the tip of Veilstone Cape arch down from the cliffside into Lunker's Lair below. A crude gravestone sits at the end of the cape, and it reads: Here rests the spirit of the Lord of the Isles, the great and noble Arcanine
